name: Seed a synthetic 7-file NAS, crawl it with the file-ops `crawl` op (streaming `{path,size,mtime}` batches over the `crawl` control channel, batch_size 3), gather-fold the batches, INDEX each file hashlessly into file_inventory via POST /api/v1/inventory/index (status indexed, no catalogue rows), then PROBE+REGISTER each file (stdlib SHA-256) via POST /api/v1/inventory/register, which fills BOTH halves: the same inventory rows are promoted to `registered` AND a content-addressed catalogue_entries row is inserted per distinct hash. All 7 files have distinct content, so catalogue_inserted is 7. The HTTP calls reach mekhan — `mekhan_url` defaults to http://localhost:13100 (override per slot, e.g. 20100).
